containerDefinitions.name: smoke-probe
command: set -eu; apk add --no-cache curl jq >/dev/null 2>&1; BASE="${BASE_URL:-https://api.vantagemind.ai}"; FAILED=0; echo "[smoke-probe] target=${BASE} expected_sha=${EXPECTED_SHA:-unset}"; for path in /health /ready /api/v1/version; do code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/body -w '%{http_code}' "${BASE}${path}" || echo 000); body=$(cat /tmp/body 2>/dev/null | head -c 500); echo "[smoke-probe] ${path} -> HTTP ${code}: ${body}"; if [ "$code" != "200" ]; then echo "[smoke-probe] FAIL on ${path}"; FAILED=1; fi; done; if [ -n "${EXPECTED_SHA:-}" ] && [ "${EXPECTED_SHA}" != "unset" ]; then VSHA=$(curl -s "${BASE}/api/v1/version" | jq -r '.git_sha // "missing"'); if [ "$VSHA" != "$EXPECTED_SHA" ]; then echo "[smoke-probe] FAIL: version git_sha=${VSHA} != expected=${EXPECTED_SHA}"; FAILED=1; else echo "[smoke-probe] PASS: version git_sha matches expected ${EXPECTED_SHA}"; fi; fi; if [ $FAILED -eq 0 ]; then echo "[smoke-probe] ALL PROBES PASSED"; exit 0; else echo "[smoke-probe] ONE OR MORE PROBES FAILED"; exit 1; fi
